feed.title: DiscoverCloudcroft.com
feed.subtitle: An independent visitor's guide to Cloudcroft, NM.
feed.rights: Copyright 2026 Mountain Monthly LLC. Editorial content; see editorial standards at https://discovercloudcroft.com/about/editorial-standards.html

entry.title: Cloudcroft from Ruidoso, NM — Sister Mountain Village 40 Min Away
entry.summary: Ruidoso to Cloudcroft is a 40-minute drive over NM-244. The two sister villages share the Sacramento Mountains but feel different — here is what to expect, which route to take, and how to plan a day trip either direction.

entry.title: Cloudcroft from Lubbock, TX — 4-Hour Drive Guide
entry.summary: Driving Cloudcroft from Lubbock, TX: ~280-300 miles, 4-4.5 hours, two route options through Roswell or Carlsbad, and why West Texans escape the heat for 8,676 ft.

entry.title: Cloudcroft from Las Cruces, NM — 90-Minute Mountain Escape
entry.summary: Las Cruces to Cloudcroft is roughly 80 miles and 1.5 hours via US-70 and US-82. A 4,800-ft climb to pine forest, 25-30°F cooler air, and dark skies. Pair with White Sands.

entry.title: Cloudcroft from El Paso, TX — Drive Guide & Trip Planning
entry.summary: Cloudcroft from El Paso, TX — a 2-hour, 130-mile drive via US-54 and US-82 to a cool 8,676 ft mountain village. Weekend escape planning, lodging, and stops along the way.

entry.title: Cloudcroft from Alamogordo, NM — 20-Minute Mountain Escape
entry.summary: Alamogordo to Cloudcroft is ~20 minutes up US-82 — a 4,400 ft climb to 8,676 ft and roughly 30°F cooler air. Day-trip plans and what to do up there.

entry.title: Zenith Park in Cloudcroft
entry.summary: Zenith Park is one of Cloudcroft’s core public spaces. It matters because it is not just a park. It is where a lot of the town’s family activity, recreation, an

entry.title: Terms and Conditions
entry.summary: Terms and Conditions for DiscoverCloudcroft.com, operated by Mountain Monthly LLC.

entry.title: Privacy Policy
entry.summary: Privacy Policy for DiscoverCloudcroft.com, operated by Mountain Monthly LLC.

entry.title: Winter Conditions in Cloudcroft, NM — Snow, Roads & Safety
entry.summary: Winter Cloudcroft NM guide — snow patterns, US-82 driving conditions, chain advice, snow play, and visitor safety at 8,676 ft. Verified May 2026.

entry.title: Water Restrictions in Cloudcroft, NM — A Visitor's Guide
entry.summary: What visitors should know about water use, drought stages, and conservation in Cloudcroft, NM at 8,676 ft. Check the village website before you travel.

entry.title: Short-Term Rentals in Cloudcroft, NM (2026) — STR Guide
entry.summary: A 2026 guide to short-term rentals in Cloudcroft, NM — pick among 148+ vacation rentals on Vrbo, Airbnb, and local managers, plus booking timing and what to verify.

entry.title: Dark Skies in Cloudcroft, NM — Stargazing at 8,676 ft
entry.summary: A practical guide to stargazing in Cloudcroft, NM — Bortle ~2-3 dark skies at 8,676 ft, best months, locations, and gear.

entry.title: Topical Guides — Cloudcroft, NM Visitor Topics
entry.summary: In-depth topical guides for Cloudcroft, NM visitors — short-term rentals, water restrictions, winter conditions, and dark skies. Authoritative answers to broad visitor questions.

entry.title: Poke The Bear, Cloudcroft NM (2026)
entry.summary: Poke The Bear on Burro Avenue — Cloudcroft's eclectic marketplace for humor gifts, novelty toys, stickers, Bigfoot souvenirs, vintage finds, and a little of everything. Something for everyone. Call for current hours.

entry.title: Editorial Standards — DiscoverCloudcroft.com
entry.summary: How DiscoverCloudcroft.com sources, verifies, and updates content. Editorial independence, conflict-of-interest policy, AI disclosure, and corrections process.

entry.title: Cloudcroft, NM — Complete 2026 Travel Guide
entry.summary: Cool off at 8,676 ft in Cloudcroft, NM — mountain lodging, scratch-kitchen restaurants, year-round trails, and Burro Ave shops in the Sacramento Mountains.

entry.title: Vacation Rentals & Cabins
entry.summary: Browse 150+ vacation rentals in Cloudcroft, NM — cozy cabins, mountain homes, and pet-friendly properties starting at $60/night on VRBO and Airbnb.

entry.title: The Summit Inn | Small Mountain Inn in Cloudcroft, NM
entry.summary: The Summit Inn is a small, owner-led, recently refreshed inn in central Cloudcroft at 8,676 ft.

entry.title: The Lodge at Cloudcroft | Booking guide 2026
entry.summary: Booking guide to The Lodge at Cloudcroft: rooms, dining at 1899, golf, history, and what to verify before you reserve. A historic destination stay at 8,676 feet.

entry.title: Spruce Cabins | Private Cabins in Cloudcroft, NM
entry.summary: Spruce Cabins offers private cabins in Cloudcroft starting at $89/night. Simple, independent cabin lodging with online booking and military/senior discounts.

entry.title: Osha Trail Lodging
entry.summary: Osha Trail Lodging is a small apartment-style lodging complex on Mexican Avenue in central Cloudcroft.

entry.title: The Grand Cloudcroft Hotel | Booking guide 2026
entry.summary: The Grand Cloudcroft Hotel: indoor year-round pool and hot tub (unique in Cloudcroft), 50 modern rooms with complimentary breakfast, 24-hour front desk

entry.title: Dusty Boots Motel and Cafe
entry.summary: Dusty Boots Motel and Cafe on James Canyon Highway in Cloudcroft, NM. 16 themed rooms (I Love Lucy, Harry Potter, Roy Rogers, and more)

entry.title: The Crofting Bed and Breakfast
entry.summary: The Crofting is a 1909 historic home turned bed and breakfast in Cloudcroft, NM. 8 individually decorated rooms, full home-cooked breakfast at 8:30 a.m.

entry.title: Cloudcroft Hostel
entry.summary: Cloudcroft Hostel is a real mountain hostel for adventurers in High Rolls Mountain Park, NM.
